'''鈭歯g-w-j-f''' ('''kangawjefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lyke|lyke]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-w-j-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lyke|lyke]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-w-j-f
|-
! Lemma
| kangawjefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingawjefoko|thingawjefoko]] || [[word:jingawjefoko|jingawjefoko]] || [[word:shingawjefoko|shingawjefoko]] || [[word:kingawjefoko|kingawjefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongawjefoko|thongawjefoko]] || [[word:jongawjefoko|jongawjefoko]] || [[word:shongawjefoko|shongawjefoko]] || [[word:kongawjefoko|kongawjefoko]]
|-

|-

|-
